query:
SELECT id, ptsRef, topdogRef, clientName, clientEmail, destination, departureDate, numberOfNights, grossCost, expectedCommission, passengers, currentStage, bookedDate
FROM bookings
WHERE agentId = 60600 AND id NOT IN (32215,30914,32234,31843,30268,990004,2400046,30598,660010,1290004,660008,660009,660007,1290005,660005,32400,1290006,1290007,31406,1080006)
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4PycK9Y631tLhJa.0110aa12e67a --database PdcDVQRp8zC2FzsyWBWptW --execute 
SELECT id, ptsRef, topdogRef, clientName, clientEmail, destination, departureDate, numberOfNights, grossCost, expectedCommission, passengers, currentStage, bookedDate
